types: Senior Archivist Pell announces a controversial new predictive algorithm could reshape the Glass Sigil’s role in city governance.
Elaris Moonshadow is caught smuggling forbidden texts to a rival syndicate, risking her sibling’s conscription draft.
The Obsidian Lotus faces backlash after a merchant accuses them of exploiting memory-erasure contracts for profit.
Brother Thane’s disappearance sparks rumors of a hidden cult project in the Northern Warrens.
Aric Veyne’s latest Rift-related quest ends in a deadly duel at the Silver Spire, raising questions about his ethics.
